meta.title: eyeread.in — Look at the lens.
meta.description: Open source teleprompter. Floats your script over any screen, invisible to every recorder. Voice tracking built in. Free.

headline: Look at the lens.
hero.subhead: eyeread.in floats your script over any screen as a glass overlay. It follows your voice — and never shows up in a recording.
hero.note: Free forever · AGPL-3.0 · No account required
hero.linuxWarning: Linux support is experimental — invisibility depends on your compositor and isn't guaranteed. See the compatibility matrix below.

overlay.spoken: We have an incredible team and a clear
overlay.upcoming: — what we need now is focus, not just speed. Let the results speak.

features.heading: Built for how people actually present.

items.title: Invisible to every recorder
items.body: eyeread.in renders outside the captured frame. Zoom, Loom, OBS, QuickTime — none of them see it. Your audience only sees the content.

items.title: Voice tracking
items.body: Speak, and the script follows. The current word glows. What you've said fades. No tapping, no foot pedal — just talk.

items.title: Near the camera
items.body: The overlay anchors just below your webcam. Your eyes naturally land on the lens — not the corner of the screen. You look present.

how.heading: Open it. Paste your script. Talk.

steps.title: Paste or type your script
steps.body: Drop in anything — a keynote, a YouTube script, talking points, interview answers. eyeread.in works with plain text.

steps.title: Position the overlay
steps.body: Drag it near your camera. Adjust font size, opacity, and speed. It floats above every other window.

steps.title: Start talking
steps.body: Voice detection takes over. The active word is highlighted. The text scrolls as you speak. Hit record whenever you’re ready.

preview.spoken: Thank you all for being here today. I want to talk about something that
preview.upcoming: more than any quarterly number — the people we serve and the trust they place in us.
preview.caption: ↑ The overlay — only you can see this

oss.heading: Free, open source, and honest about it.
oss.body: eyeread.in is fully open source. Read the code, audit it, fork it, contribute to it. No tracking, no telemetry, no subscription. If it helps you — donate voluntarily.

guarantees.title: No account required
guarantees.body: Download and use immediately — no sign-up, no email

guarantees.title: No telemetry
guarantees.body: Nothing leaves your machine. Your scripts stay private.

guarantees.title: macOS & Windows · native app
guarantees.body: OS-enforced invisibility on macOS and Windows. Linux is experimental.

guarantees.title: Donation-supported
guarantees.body: If eyeread.in helps you, pay it forward — no pressure

compat.heading: Which versions are supported — and who confirmed it
compat.subhead: macOS and Windows get OS-enforced invisibility; Linux is best-effort and depends on your compositor. Here’s what testers have verified on each — add yours.

sponsors.heading: Backers & sponsors
sponsors.subhead: eyeread.in is funded entirely by people who believe in honest, open tools. These are the humans keeping it free.
sponsors.emptyMessage: Be the first to back eyeread.in →
sponsors.errorMessage: Couldn’t load backers right now. View them on Open Collective →

collective.blurb: Open source for everyday problems — free, AGPL-3.0 tools, built in the open.

meta.title: Download · eyeread.in
meta.description: Download eyeread.in for macOS, Windows, and Linux — Stable or Glimpse builds.

download.heading: Download for your platform
download.glimpseSub: Built automatically from the latest code, most days.
download.glimpseWarning: Glimpse builds are for testers — they may be unstable or contain unfinished features. Most people should use Stable above.
